caption: A woman with short dark hair and glasses is speaking against a solid black background. She is wearing a light green, long-sleeved tunic with red and black floral embroidery around the neckline. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the front of her shirt. In the bottom-left corner of the scene, a circular logo is visible next to the text "NPTEL". As the sequence progresses, the woman is captured in various stages of speaking, with her mouth opening and closing and her facial expressions shifting slightly. She uses her hands to gesture, bringing them up toward her chest as she emphasizes her points. Her head tilts slightly as she speaks, while her general position and the stark, dark setting remain constant throughout the clip.
